message:
🐛 fix: update useVersionCheck tests for ref-guarded error handling (#8596) (#8598)

PR #8591 added consecutiveFailuresRef with ERROR_DISPLAY_THRESHOLD = 2,
meaning errors only surface after two consecutive failures. The seven
failing tests expected errors after a single forceCheck() call, but
forceCheck resets the counter so one call only reaches count=1.

Fix: follow forceCheck() with checkForUpdates() (which does NOT reset
the counter) so the second failure meets the threshold. For
fetchAutoUpdateStatus tests, the mount-time effect provides the first
failure, then an explicit checkForUpdates() call provides the second.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
